name: Rail & Metro Projects
description: NABL accredited mechanical & chemical material testing services for major railway tracks, metro stations, and transport infrastructure projects.

name: Airport Project
description: Runway concrete quality evaluation, terminal building structures, and structural integrity mapping for international & domestic airports.

name: Tunnel Projects
description: Quality assurance, soil compaction, non-destructive testing (NDT), and concrete strength testing for high-altitude & underground tunnel networks.

name: Bridge Project
description: Load testing, structural steel inspection, ultrasonic testing on welds, and concrete durability assessment for flyovers & major river bridges.

name: Road & Highway Projects
description: Moorum testing, GSB & WMM evaluation, bituminous membrane testing, and soil bearing capacity measurements for major national highway networks.

name: Power Plant & Power Station Projects
description: Thermal power infrastructure testing, turbine foundation concrete evaluation, and specialized alloy/chemical composition testing.

name: Housing Project
description: Mass housing infrastructure quality evaluation, brick, cement, sand, and water quality testing for housing boards & private developments.

name: Building Projects
description: Commercial complexes, high-rise skyscrapers structural concrete, reinforcements, and load-bearing materials quality certifications.

name: Research & Development (R&D) Projects
description: Specialized material analysis, testing of new polymer combinations, steel splicing slips, and concrete durability enhancements.

name: Others Activity
description: Third-party inspection audits, site laboratory setups, customized chemical tests, and NDT audits for municipal corporations.
